## Prediction Schema


Each snapshot contains per-game predictions with the following columns:


| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `game_id` | Unique game identifier |
| `incumbent_home_win_prob` | Predicted home win probability (0–1) |
| `confidence_bucket` | Probability range (50-55, 55-60, …, 80+) |
| `caution_qb_change` | QB did not start prior game |
| `caution_early_season` | Week ≤ 4 |
| `qb_source` | `oracle` or `live_pregame` |
| `model_version` | Incumbent version |

## Confidence Buckets


| Bucket | Range | Description |
|--------|-------|-------------|
| 50-55 | 0.50–0.55 | Near coin flip |
| 55-60 | 0.55–0.60 | Slight favorite |
| 60-65 | 0.60–0.65 | Moderate favorite |
| 65-70 | 0.65–0.70 | Solid favorite |
| 70-80 | 0.70–0.80 | Strong favorite |
| 80+ | 0.80+ | Heavy favorite |
